title: Guardians of Gaia — Game Rules Bible

ability_checks.description: When a player attempts an uncertain action, roll a d20. Add any relevant modifier.

combat.initiative: Each combatant rolls d20 + Dexterity modifier; highest goes first
combat.attack_roll: Roll d20 + attack modifier vs. target's Armor Class (AC)
combat.damage: On hit, roll weapon damage dice (e.g. d6 for sword, d4 for dagger)
combat.death: Player falls unconscious at 0 HP; stabilized by DC 10 Medicine check

hit_points.healing: Short rest: roll HD. Long rest: regain all HP
hit_points.temporary_hp: Temporary HP is lost first, does not stack

actions.improvised_action: The Dungeon Master may allow any creative action with an appropriate ability check

magic.description: Spells cost spell slots. Cantrips are free and unlimited.
magic.concentration: Some spells require concentration. Taking damage requires DC 10 or half damage Constitution save.
magic.spell_attack: Roll d20 + spellcasting modifier vs. target AC or target rolls saving throw

exploration.movement: Standard movement is 30 feet per turn
exploration.perception: Passive Perception = 10 + Wisdom modifier. Active search uses Action
exploration.traps_and_secrets: DC set by GM, revealed by successful Perception or Investigation check

social.intimidation: Charisma (Intimidation) vs. NPC's Wisdom saving throw

resting.short_rest: 1 hour; spend Hit Dice to recover HP
resting.long_rest: 8 hours; regain all HP, spell slots, and class features

conditions.Blinded: Can't see; attacks against have advantage; attacks made are at disadvantage
conditions.Charmed: Can't attack the charmer; charmer has advantage on social checks
conditions.Frightened: Disadvantage on ability checks and attacks while source is visible
conditions.Paralyzed: Incapacitated; auto-fail Str/Dex saves; attacks from adjacent have crit advantage
conditions.Poisoned: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks
conditions.Stunned: Incapacitated; fails Str/Dex saves; attacks against have advantage

special_rules_for_science_sessions.knowledge_bonus: Players who correctly answer a science question gain +2 to their next roll
special_rules_for_science_sessions.eureka_moment: On a natural 20 on an Intelligence check, gain a free Eureka Token usable to auto-pass one science challenge
special_rules_for_science_sessions.collaborative_discovery: When all players agree on a science answer, the party gains Inspiration
